description: Project 2-4 plausible future scenarios from findings, with probabilities, implications, and early signals
usage: what might happen, future scenarios, if we do this then, forecast outcomes, predict what happens

target.description: What to project scenarios for (matches upstream research/compare filenames)

horizon.description: Time horizon for projections: near (6-12 months), medium (1-3 years), far (3-10 years)
